title: A1 · Principiante
subtitle: Survival vocab — greetings, family, basic verbs, everyday objects.
focus: First 100-word group: a balanced sampler across nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs and phrases. Use this group to test the whole flow; add more groups by dropping more `group-N.json` files next to this index and listing them below.

groups.title: Empezar · First survival words
groups.focus: Greetings, family, very common verbs, everyday objects, basic feelings.

groups.title: Vida cotidiana · Food, colours and places
groups.focus: Common food items, colours, places, transport, very common verbs not yet in group 1.

groups.title: Familia y tiempo · People, body and calendar
groups.focus: Essential A1 vocabulary for family, people, body parts, calendar words and simple descriptions.

groups.title: Casa y ciudad · Home, weather and daily places
groups.focus: A1 words for rooms, household objects, weather, local places and basic city life.

groups.title: Comer y estudiar · Food, school and useful actions
groups.focus: A1 food, classroom vocabulary, simple actions, quantities and survival phrases.

groups.title: Números y medidas · Numbers, quantities and basics
groups.focus: More A1 numbers, quantities, shapes, measures and simple everyday nouns.

groups.title: Objetos y servicios · Daily objects and local services
groups.focus: A1 vocabulary for everyday objects, local errands, simple services and public places.

groups.title: Acciones básicas · Useful verbs and descriptions
groups.focus: High-frequency A1 verbs, simple adjectives and phrases for describing daily needs and actions.
